source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
translated_text: Hello. Are you free this afternoon?
reference_text: Hi, are you free this afternoon?

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: Please call me back by 3:00.
reference_text: Please call me back before three o'clock.

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: I've been to the subway door.
reference_text: I've already arrived at the subway station entrance.

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: Two copies of this document are required.
reference_text: This document needs to be printed in two copies.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: I'm not going to the company today. It's on the line.
reference_text: I'm not going to the office today. I'll switch to online instead.

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: I'm meeting with my client tonight at 6:00. If traffic gets in, I'll send you a message. Please help me keep the conference room until 7:00.
reference_text: I'm meeting a client at six tonight. If traffic is bad, I'll message you first. Please keep the meeting room reserved for me until seven.

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: There's milk and eggs in the fridge, but the fruit is almost finished. If you go to the supermarket after work, buy me two bananas and a bag of bread.
reference_text: There is still milk and eggs in the fridge, but we're almost out of fruit. If you stop by the supermarket after work, please buy two bananas and a bag of bread for me.

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we'll go to the park, take a seat at the nearby coffee shop and check the schedule for next week.
reference_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we won't go to the park. We'll go to a nearby cafe instead, sit for a while, and confirm next week's schedule.

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: I just spoke to the landlord and he said he'd fix the water heater tomorrow at 2:00. If you're home, just move the thing off the balcony.
reference_text: I just finished talking to the landlord. He said he'll come tomorrow at two in the afternoon to fix the water heater. If you're home, please remember to move the things on the balcony in advance.
must_preserve: move the things on the balcony

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: This restaurant is crowded for the weekend, so it's better to book it first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
translated_text: I've arranged the next week's trip again: Monday morning, I'll go to the airport, then I'll go to the client's office directly, and I'll do the product presentation at 3:00. If you have time, I'd like to make a short remix at night, so that I can write down the questions that the other side has asked for the next day, so that I can separate the prototype from the chargers and put them in the bag in advance, so that if the scene needs to be supplemented, I don't have to go into the files.
reference_text: I went over next week's business trip schedule again: on Monday morning I'll head to the airport first, go straight to the client's office after landing, and give the product demo at three in the afternoon. If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
translated_text: Mom called yesterday to say that Grandma's stomach was not so good, but she's still in good spirit. She told me not to worry, but to remind me that if I was free on weekends, I'd better go back and take the last medicine. If you're comfortable, we could go out on Saturday mornings, come home by noon and have dinner with her before we return. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, and the most important thing is that she knows that we've been thinking about her and that she can look at her if she needs help.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: I want to make this team dinner as easy as possible, so I'll just pick the place around the company and then walk around after work. I'll check the menu first, with both hot and non-hot and vegetarian options. The only thing I need to confirm early is the number, because the store says more than eight people have to order a day before they get there, or it's a little slow. I want to tell you earlier that someone can't eat seafood and that someone's been controlling the heat, and I want to think about it early before we change it.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed up the photos from the computer to the mobile hard drive and just sorted out a few folders. The videos that I travelled last year took a lot of space, so I'm gonna delete the duplicate footage and upload the material to the cloud. If the network is stable tonight, you can check the name if there's any problems, so that I can get it out of the way. I want to put a single date and place tag on each folder tomorrow, so that when I do the album or temporarily find the material, it will be much more time-consuming than it is now and it will not be easy to mix the same stuff.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I've been doing a little bit of a little bit of a mess lately, and I want to start adjusting from next week. The plan is to wake up every morning at 7:00, walk for 20 minutes, come back for breakfast, and then start working on the most important job at 8:30. Try to sleep at 11:00 at night, not read the news before going to bed. If I delay again, remind me that I can easily find an excuse. I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: This restaurant is crowded for the weekend, so it's better to book it first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
translated_text: I've arranged the next week's trip again: Monday morning, I'll go to the airport, then I'll go to the client's office directly, and I'll do the product presentation at 3:00. If you have time, I'd like to make a short remix at night, so that I can write down the questions that the other side has asked for the next day, so that I can separate the prototype from the chargers and put them in the bag in advance, so that if the scene needs to be supplemented, I don't have to go into the files.
reference_text: I went over next week's business trip schedule again: on Monday morning I'll head to the airport first, go straight to the client's office after landing, and give the product demo at three in the afternoon. If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
translated_text: Mom called yesterday to say that Grandma's stomach was not so good, but she's still in good spirit. She told me not to worry, but to remind me that if I was free on weekends, I'd better go back and take the last medicine. If you're comfortable, we could go out on Saturday mornings, come home by noon and have dinner with her before we return. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, and the most important thing is that she knows that we've been thinking about her and that she can look at her if she needs help.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: I want to make this team dinner as easy as possible, so I'll just pick the place around the company and then walk around after work. I'll check the menu first, with both hot and non-hot and vegetarian options. The only thing I need to confirm early is the number, because the store says more than eight people have to order a day before they get there, or it's a little slow. I want to tell you earlier that someone can't eat seafood and that someone's been controlling the heat, and I want to think about it early before we change it.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed up the photos from the computer to the mobile hard drive and just sorted out a few folders. The videos that I travelled last year took a lot of space, so I'm gonna delete the duplicate footage and upload the material to the cloud. If the network is stable tonight, you can check the name if there's any problems, so that I can get it out of the way. I want to put a single date and place tag on each folder tomorrow, so that when I do the album or temporarily find the material, it will be much more time-consuming than it is now and it will not be easy to mix the same stuff.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I've been doing a little bit of a little bit of a mess lately, and I want to start adjusting from next week. The plan is to wake up every morning at 7:00, walk for 20 minutes, come back for breakfast, and then start working on the most important job at 8:30. Try to sleep at 11:00 at night, not read the news before going to bed. If I delay again, remind me that I can easily find an excuse. I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
translated_text: Hello. Are you free this afternoon?
reference_text: Hi, are you free this afternoon?

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: Please call me back by 3:00.
reference_text: Please call me back before three o'clock.

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: I've been to the subway door.
reference_text: I've already arrived at the subway station entrance.

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: Two copies of this document are required.
reference_text: This document needs to be printed in two copies.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: I'm not going to the company today. It's on the line.
reference_text: I'm not going to the office today. I'll switch to online instead.

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: I'm meeting with my client tonight at 6:00. If traffic gets in, I'll send you a message. Please help me keep the conference room until 7:00.
reference_text: I'm meeting a client at six tonight. If traffic is bad, I'll message you first. Please keep the meeting room reserved for me until seven.

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: There's milk and eggs in the fridge, but the fruit is almost finished. If you go to the supermarket after work, buy me two bananas and a bag of bread.
reference_text: There is still milk and eggs in the fridge, but we're almost out of fruit. If you stop by the supermarket after work, please buy two bananas and a bag of bread for me.

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we'll go to the park, take a seat at the nearby coffee shop and check the schedule for next week.
reference_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we won't go to the park. We'll go to a nearby cafe instead, sit for a while, and confirm next week's schedule.

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: I just spoke to the landlord and he said he'd fix the water heater tomorrow at 2:00. If you're home, just move the thing off the balcony.
reference_text: I just finished talking to the landlord. He said he'll come tomorrow at two in the afternoon to fix the water heater. If you're home, please remember to move the things on the balcony in advance.
must_preserve: move the things on the balcony

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: This restaurant is crowded for the weekend, so it's better to book it first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

She told me not to worry, but to remind me that if I was free on weekends, I'd better go back and take the last medicine. If you're comfortable, we could go out on Saturday mornings, come home by noon and have dinner with her before we return. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, and the most important thing is that she knows that we've been thinking about her and that she can look at her if she needs help.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: I want to make this team dinner as easy as possible, so I'll just pick the place around the company and then walk around after work. I'll check the menu first, with both hot and non-hot and vegetarian options. The only thing I need to confirm early is the number, because the store says more than eight people have to order a day before they get there, or it's a little slow. I want to tell you earlier that someone can't eat seafood and that someone's been controlling the heat, and I want to think about it early before we change it.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed up the photos from the computer to the mobile hard drive and just sorted out a few folders. The videos that I travelled last year took a lot of space, so I'm gonna delete the duplicate footage and upload the material to the cloud. If the network is stable tonight, you can check the name if there's any problems, so that I can get it out of the way. I want to put a single date and place tag on each folder tomorrow, so that when I do the album or temporarily find the material, it will be much more time-consuming than it is now and it will not be easy to mix the same stuff.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I've been doing a little bit of a little bit of a mess lately, and I want to start adjusting from next week. The plan is to wake up every morning at 7:00, walk for 20 minutes, come back for breakfast, and then start working on the most important job at 8:30. Try to sleep at 11:00 at night, not read the news before going to bed. If I delay again, remind me that I can easily find an excuse. I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。

reference_text: 最近は生活リズムが少し乱れているので、来週から立て直したいと思っています。毎朝七時に起きて、まず二十分散歩し、戻って朝食を取り、そのあと八時半から一番大事な仕事に取りかかる予定です。夜はできるだけ十一時前に寝て、寝る前にはメッセージも動画も見ないようにします。もしまた先延ばしにし始めたら、すぐに注意してください。そうしないと、私はすぐ自分に言い訳をしてしまいます。さらに、週末には半日ほど家事と買い出しの時間も取り、冷蔵庫を補充して、来週着る服も先に用意しておけば、平日の夜に疲れて適当に出前を頼むことも減らせるはずです。

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。

reference_text: 最近は生活リズムが少し乱れているので、来週から立て直したいと思っています。毎朝七時に起きて、まず二十分散歩し、戻って朝食を取り、そのあと八時半から一番大事な仕事に取りかかる予定です。夜はできるだけ十一時前に寝て、寝る前にはメッセージも動画も見ないようにします。もしまた先延ばしにし始めたら、すぐに注意してください。そうしないと、私はすぐ自分に言い訳をしてしまいます。さらに、週末には半日ほど家事と買い出しの時間も取り、冷蔵庫を補充して、来週着る服も先に用意しておけば、平日の夜に疲れて適当に出前を頼むことも減らせるはずです。

reference_text: 来週の出張予定をもう一度整理しました。月曜の朝はまず空港へ行き、到着したらそのままお客さまのオフィスへ向かい、午後三時に製品デモを行います。夜にみんなの時間がまだあるなら、短い振り返りも入れて、その場で出た質問を全部メモし、翌日の打ち合わせで漏れが出ないようにしたいです。さらに、実機と充電器は別々に入れ、資料も二部印刷してかばんに入れておけば、現場で急に補足説明が必要になっても慌てずに済みます。

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: わたしは 恥をもつ所を,さやくまでにつり刻み,細かに追いやられる. わたしは一 年の間は,くじの木,または,よどんばしばし, 後につながむ. あざみが 身 ように nakednessれば,おのおの生かんとう.
reference_text: さっきパソコンの写真を外付けハードディスクにバックアップして、そのついでにいくつかのフォルダも整理しました。去年の旅行動画はかなり容量を使っているので、まず重複した部分を削除してから、大事な素材をクラウドにアップロードするつもりです。今夜ネット回線が安定していたら、あとで探すのが面倒にならないように、ファイル名に問題がないか一緒に確認してもらえますか。明日は各フォルダに日付と場所のタグも付けたいと思っていて、そうすれば今後アルバムを作る時や急いで素材を探す時にかなり楽になりますし、似た内容を取り違えにくくなります。
must_preserve: 外付けハードディスク

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: わたしは, 勧めをふくことのため,一晩餐から第二の励まぬ衣であり,一週間をふき 時のあなたのために備え,酒厳とをもって,ためらんをみなさい. わたしは,さからそれを航行のため,夜んとげるごとに注意を流すけ,また,によって酒悩ますことにしない.
reference_text: 最近は生活リズムが少し乱れているので、来週から立て直したいと思っています。毎朝七時に起きて、まず二十分散歩し、戻って朝食を取り、そのあと八時半から一番大事な仕事に取りかかる予定です。夜はできるだけ十一時前に寝て、寝る前にはメッセージも動画も見ないようにします。もしまた先延ばしにし始めたら、すぐに注意してください。そうしないと、私はすぐ自分に言い訳をしてしまいます。さらに、週末には半日ほど家事と買い出しの時間も取り、冷蔵庫を補充して、来週着る服も先に用意しておけば、平日の夜に疲れて適当に出前を頼むことも減らせるはずです。
must_preserve: メッセージも動画も見ない

I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.

must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
translated_text: I've arranged the next week's trip again: Monday morning, I'll go to the airport, then I'll go to the client's office directly, and I'll do the product presentation at 3:00. If you have time, I'd like to make a short remix at night, so that I can write down the questions that the other side has asked for the next day, so that I can separate the prototype from the chargers and put them in the bag in advance, so that if the scene needs to be supplemented, I don't have to go into the files.
reference_text: I went over next week's business trip schedule again: on Monday morning I'll head to the airport first, go straight to the client's office after landing, and give the product demo at three in the afternoon. If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
translated_text: Mom called yesterday to say that Grandma's stomach was not so good, but she's still in good spirit. She told me not to worry, but to remind me that if I was free on weekends, I'd better go back and take the last medicine. If you're comfortable, we could go out on Saturday mornings, come home by noon and have dinner with her before we return. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, and the most important thing is that she knows that we've been thinking about her and that she can look at her if she needs help.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: I want to make this team dinner as easy as possible, so I'll just pick the place around the company and then walk around after work. I'll check the menu first, with both hot and non-hot and vegetarian options. The only thing I need to confirm early is the number, because the store says more than eight people have to order a day before they get there, or it's a little slow. I want to tell you earlier that someone can't eat seafood and that someone's been controlling the heat, and I want to think about it early before we change it.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed up the photos from the computer to the mobile hard drive and just sorted out a few folders. The videos that I travelled last year took a lot of space, so I'm gonna delete the duplicate footage and upload the material to the cloud. If the network is stable tonight, you can check the name if there's any problems, so that I can get it out of the way. I want to put a single date and place tag on each folder tomorrow, so that when I do the album or temporarily find the material, it will be much more time-consuming than it is now and it will not be easy to mix the same stuff.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I've been doing a little bit of a little bit of a mess lately, and I want to start adjusting from next week. The plan is to wake up every morning at 7:00, walk for 20 minutes, come back for breakfast, and then start working on the most important job at 8:30. Try to sleep at 11:00 at night, not read the news before going to bed. If I delay again, remind me that I can easily find an excuse. I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
translated_text: Hello. Are you free this afternoon?
reference_text: Hi, are you free this afternoon?

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: Please call me back by 3:00.
reference_text: Please call me back before three o'clock.

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: I've been to the subway door.
reference_text: I've already arrived at the subway station entrance.

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: Two copies of this document are required.
reference_text: This document needs to be printed in two copies.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: I'm not going to the company today. It's on the line.
reference_text: I'm not going to the office today. I'll switch to online instead.

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: I'm meeting with my client tonight at 6:00. If traffic gets in, I'll send you a message. Please help me keep the conference room until 7:00.
reference_text: I'm meeting a client at six tonight. If traffic is bad, I'll message you first. Please keep the meeting room reserved for me until seven.

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: There's milk and eggs in the fridge, but the fruit is almost finished. If you go to the supermarket after work, buy me two bananas and a bag of bread.
reference_text: There is still milk and eggs in the fridge, but we're almost out of fruit. If you stop by the supermarket after work, please buy two bananas and a bag of bread for me.

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we'll go to the park, take a seat at the nearby coffee shop and check the schedule for next week.
reference_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we won't go to the park. We'll go to a nearby cafe instead, sit for a while, and confirm next week's schedule.

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: I just spoke to the landlord and he said he'd fix the water heater tomorrow at 2:00. If you're home, just move the thing off the balcony.
reference_text: I just finished talking to the landlord. He said he'll come tomorrow at two in the afternoon to fix the water heater. If you're home, please remember to move the things on the balcony in advance.
must_preserve: move the things on the balcony

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: This restaurant is crowded for the weekend, so it's better to book it first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: I want to make this team dinner as easy as possible, so I'll just pick the place around the company and then walk around after work. I'll check the menu first, with both hot and non-hot and vegetarian options. The only thing I need to confirm early is the number, because the store says more than eight people have to order a day before they get there, or it's a little slow. I want to tell you earlier that someone can't eat seafood and that someone's been controlling the heat, and I want to think about it early before we change it.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed up the photos from the computer to the mobile hard drive and just sorted out a few folders. The videos that I travelled last year took a lot of space, so I'm gonna delete the duplicate footage and upload the material to the cloud. If the network is stable tonight, you can check the name if there's any problems, so that I can get it out of the way. I want to put a single date and place tag on each folder tomorrow, so that when I do the album or temporarily find the material, it will be much more time-consuming than it is now and it will not be easy to mix the same stuff.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I've been doing a little bit of a little bit of a mess lately, and I want to start adjusting from next week. The plan is to wake up every morning at 7:00, walk for 20 minutes, come back for breakfast, and then start working on the most important job at 8:30. Try to sleep at 11:00 at night, not read the news before going to bed. If I delay again, remind me that I can easily find an excuse. I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
translated_text: Hello. Are you free this afternoon?
reference_text: Hi, are you free this afternoon?

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: Please call me back by 3:00.
reference_text: Please call me back before three o'clock.

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: I've been to the subway door.
reference_text: I've already arrived at the subway station entrance.

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: Two copies of this document are required.
reference_text: This document needs to be printed in two copies.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: I'm not going to the company today. It's on the line.
reference_text: I'm not going to the office today. I'll switch to online instead.

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: I'm meeting with my client tonight at 6:00. If traffic gets in, I'll send you a message. Please help me keep the conference room until 7:00.
reference_text: I'm meeting a client at six tonight. If traffic is bad, I'll message you first. Please keep the meeting room reserved for me until seven.

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: There's milk and eggs in the fridge, but the fruit is almost finished. If you go to the supermarket after work, buy me two bananas and a bag of bread.
reference_text: There is still milk and eggs in the fridge, but we're almost out of fruit. If you stop by the supermarket after work, please buy two bananas and a bag of bread for me.

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we'll go to the park, take a seat at the nearby coffee shop and check the schedule for next week.
reference_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we won't go to the park. We'll go to a nearby cafe instead, sit for a while, and confirm next week's schedule.

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: I just spoke to the landlord and he said he'd fix the water heater tomorrow at 2:00. If you're home, just move the thing off the balcony.
reference_text: I just finished talking to the landlord. He said he'll come tomorrow at two in the afternoon to fix the water heater. If you're home, please remember to move the things on the balcony in advance.
must_preserve: move the things on the balcony

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: This restaurant is crowded for the weekend, so it's better to book it first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
translated_text: I've arranged the next week's trip again: Monday morning, I'll go to the airport, then I'll go to the client's office directly, and I'll do the product presentation at 3:00. If you have time, I'd like to make a short remix at night, so that I can write down the questions that the other side has asked for the next day, so that I can separate the prototype from the chargers and put them in the bag in advance, so that if the scene needs to be supplemented, I don't have to go into the files.
reference_text: I went over next week's business trip schedule again: on Monday morning I'll head to the airport first, go straight to the client's office after landing, and give the product demo at three in the afternoon. If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
translated_text: Mom called yesterday to say that Grandma's stomach was not so good, but she's still in good spirit. She told me not to worry, but to remind me that if I was free on weekends, I'd better go back and take the last medicine. If you're comfortable, we could go out on Saturday mornings, come home by noon and have dinner with her before we return. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, and the most important thing is that she knows that we've been thinking about her and that she can look at her if she needs help.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

translated_text: I just backed up the photos from the computer to the mobile hard drive and just sorted out a few folders. The videos that I travelled last year took a lot of space, so I'm gonna delete the duplicate footage and upload the material to the cloud. If the network is stable tonight, you can check the name if there's any problems, so that I can get it out of the way. I want to put a single date and place tag on each folder tomorrow, so that when I do the album or temporarily find the material, it will be much more time-consuming than it is now and it will not be easy to mix the same stuff.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I've been doing a little bit of a little bit of a mess lately, and I want to start adjusting from next week. The plan is to wake up every morning at 7:00, walk for 20 minutes, come back for breakfast, and then start working on the most important job at 8:30. Try to sleep at 11:00 at night, not read the news before going to bed. If I delay again, remind me that I can easily find an excuse. I want to spend half a day on housekeeping and shopping, fill up the fridge and get ready for next week's clothes, so that the night of work does not always go out of order because I'm too tired.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: 後日談: 後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談
reference_text: 今夜六時にお客さまと会います。もし渋滞していたら先にメッセージしますので、会議室を七時まで取っておいてください。

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: (ひょうたん)は(は)の(はり)を視(み)るに、(はり)は(こ)の(こ)をもたず。
reference_text: 冷蔵庫にはまだ牛乳と卵がありますが、果物はもうすぐなくなります。仕事帰りにスーパーへ寄るなら、バナナを二本とパンを一袋買ってきてください。

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: (きびす)を(たお)れて、(きび)を(たた)えて(たれ)を(はね)る。
reference_text: 明日の朝に雨が降ったら、公園には行かず、近くのカフェに行って少し座り、そのついでに来週の予定を確認しましょう。

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: (たれ)は、(たれ)を(はり)て、(たれ)を(はり)て、
reference_text: さっき大家さんと電話をしました。大家さんは明日の午後二時に給湯器を修理しに来るそうです。家にいるなら、ベランダの物を先にどかしておいてください。

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: (はりつけ)または(はりつけ)の英語力(ごしりょく)は、
reference_text: この店は週末になるととても混むので、先に予約したほうがいいです。来られることが確定したら、今夜のうちに四人分の席をまとめて予約します。

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
reference_text: 来週の出張予定をもう一度整理しました。月曜の朝はまず空港へ行き、到着したらそのままお客さまのオフィスへ向かい、午後三時に製品デモを行います。夜にみんなの時間がまだあるなら、短い振り返りも入れて、その場で出た質問を全部メモし、翌日の打ち合わせで漏れが出ないようにしたいです。さらに、実機と充電器は別々に入れ、資料も二部印刷してかばんに入れておけば、現場で急に補足説明が必要になっても慌てずに済みます。

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
reference_text: 昨日、母から電話があり、祖母はこの二日あまり食欲がないものの、元気はまだあるそうです。あまり心配しなくていいと言っていましたが、週末に時間があれば顔を見に行って、この前買った薬も持って行ったほうがいいと念を押されました。あなたも都合がつくなら、土曜の朝に一緒に出発して、昼前に着き、祖母と食事をしてから帰りましょう。祖母が休みたそうなら長居する必要はなく、私たちがいつも気にかけていると伝えられれば十分ですし、家で手伝えることがあるかも一緒に見ておけます。
must_preserve: あまり心配しなくていい

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
reference_text: 今回のチーム会食はできるだけ気楽な雰囲気にしたいので、場所は会社の近くにして、みんなは退勤後に歩いて行けるようにしました。メニューは先に見ておきましたが、辛い物も辛くない物もあり、ベジタリアン向けの選択肢もあります。早めに確認しないといけないのは人数だけで、店によると八人を超える場合は前日までに料理を決めないと、提供が遅くなるそうです。さらに、食べられない物も早めに教えてほしくて、海鮮がだめな人もいれば最近カロリーを気にしている人もいるので、そのあたりも先に考えておきたいです。

translated_text: のは「墓は糖尿病に耐えられない」とののファイル形式のである。 ののの1つののの「」ののの「」のののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののの
reference_text: さっきパソコンの写真を外付けハードディスクにバックアップして、そのついでにいくつかのフォルダも整理しました。去年の旅行動画はかなり容量を使っているので、まず重複した部分を削除してから、大事な素材をクラウドにアップロードするつもりです。今夜ネット回線が安定していたら、あとで探すのが面倒にならないように、ファイル名に問題がないか一緒に確認してもらえますか。明日は各フォルダに日付と場所のタグも付けたいと思っていて、そうすれば今後アルバムを作る時や急いで素材を探す時にかなり楽になりますし、似た内容を取り違えにくくなります。
must_preserve: 外付けハードディスク

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: しかし、私の民の貧困は、どのようにのフォントの手を配置する" ""全体のsh"、のの消化を試みた、ウクライナの後 ののウクライナの、米国のの"のの"のののののののののの英語、のののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののののの
reference_text: 最近は生活リズムが少し乱れているので、来週から立て直したいと思っています。毎朝七時に起きて、まず二十分散歩し、戻って朝食を取り、そのあと八時半から一番大事な仕事に取りかかる予定です。夜はできるだけ十一時前に寝て、寝る前にはメッセージも動画も見ないようにします。もしまた先延ばしにし始めたら、すぐに注意してください。そうしないと、私はすぐ自分に言い訳をしてしまいます。さらに、週末には半日ほど家事と買い出しの時間も取り、冷蔵庫を補充して、来週着る服も先に用意しておけば、平日の夜に疲れて適当に出前を頼むことも減らせるはずです。
must_preserve: メッセージも動画も見ない

source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
reference_text: こんにちは、今日の午後は空いていますか。

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: 地区(アメリカと英語圏)のとき
reference_text: 三時までに折り返し電話してください。

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: ファイル我慢,
reference_text: もう地下鉄の駅の入口に着きました。

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: はで、
reference_text: この書類は全部で二部印刷する必要があります。

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: ツアー「、
reference_text: 今日は会社に行かず、オンラインに切り替えます。

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: 後日談: 後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談:後日談
reference_text: 今夜六時にお客さまと会います。もし渋滞していたら先にメッセージしますので、会議室を七時まで取っておいてください。

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: (ひょうたん)は(は)の(はり)を視(み)るに、(はり)は(こ)の(こ)をもたず。
reference_text: 冷蔵庫にはまだ牛乳と卵がありますが、果物はもうすぐなくなります。仕事帰りにスーパーへ寄るなら、バナナを二本とパンを一袋買ってきてください。

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: (きびす)を(たお)れて、(きび)を(たた)えて(たれ)を(はね)る。
reference_text: 明日の朝に雨が降ったら、公園には行かず、近くのカフェに行って少し座り、そのついでに来週の予定を確認しましょう。

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: (たれ)は、(たれ)を(はり)て、(たれ)を(はり)て、
reference_text: さっき大家さんと電話をしました。大家さんは明日の午後二時に給湯器を修理しに来るそうです。家にいるなら、ベランダの物を先にどかしておいてください。

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: (はりつけ)または(はりつけ)の英語力(ごしりょく)は、
reference_text: この店は週末になるととても混むので、先に予約したほうがいいです。来られることが確定したら、今夜のうちに四人分の席をまとめて予約します。

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
reference_text: 来週の出張予定をもう一度整理しました。月曜の朝はまず空港へ行き、到着したらそのままお客さまのオフィスへ向かい、午後三時に製品デモを行います。夜にみんなの時間がまだあるなら、短い振り返りも入れて、その場で出た質問を全部メモし、翌日の打ち合わせで漏れが出ないようにしたいです。さらに、実機と充電器は別々に入れ、資料も二部印刷してかばんに入れておけば、現場で急に補足説明が必要になっても慌てずに済みます。

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
reference_text: 昨日、母から電話があり、祖母はこの二日あまり食欲がないものの、元気はまだあるそうです。あまり心配しなくていいと言っていましたが、週末に時間があれば顔を見に行って、この前買った薬も持って行ったほうがいいと念を押されました。あなたも都合がつくなら、土曜の朝に一緒に出発して、昼前に着き、祖母と食事をしてから帰りましょう。祖母が休みたそうなら長居する必要はなく、私たちがいつも気にかけていると伝えられれば十分ですし、家で手伝えることがあるかも一緒に見ておけます。
must_preserve: あまり心配しなくていい

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
reference_text: 今回のチーム会食はできるだけ気楽な雰囲気にしたいので、場所は会社の近くにして、みんなは退勤後に歩いて行けるようにしました。メニューは先に見ておきましたが、辛い物も辛くない物もあり、ベジタリアン向けの選択肢もあります。早めに確認しないといけないのは人数だけで、店によると八人を超える場合は前日までに料理を決めないと、提供が遅くなるそうです。さらに、食べられない物も早めに教えてほしくて、海鮮がだめな人もいれば最近カロリーを気にしている人もいるので、そのあたりも先に考えておきたいです。
must_preserve: 辛い物も辛くない物も
カロリーを気にしている

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
reference_text: 来週の出張予定をもう一度整理しました。月曜の朝はまず空港へ行き、到着したらそのままお客さまのオフィスへ向かい、午後三時に製品デモを行います。夜にみんなの時間がまだあるなら、短い振り返りも入れて、その場で出た質問を全部メモし、翌日の打ち合わせで漏れが出ないようにしたいです。さらに、実機と充電器は別々に入れ、資料も二部印刷してかばんに入れておけば、現場で急に補足説明が必要になっても慌てずに済みます。

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
reference_text: 昨日、母から電話があり、祖母はこの二日あまり食欲がないものの、元気はまだあるそうです。あまり心配しなくていいと言っていましたが、週末に時間があれば顔を見に行って、この前買った薬も持って行ったほうがいいと念を押されました。あなたも都合がつくなら、土曜の朝に一緒に出発して、昼前に着き、祖母と食事をしてから帰りましょう。祖母が休みたそうなら長居する必要はなく、私たちがいつも気にかけていると伝えられれば十分ですし、家で手伝えることがあるかも一緒に見ておけます。

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
reference_text: 今回のチーム会食はできるだけ気楽な雰囲気にしたいので、場所は会社の近くにして、みんなは退勤後に歩いて行けるようにしました。メニューは先に見ておきましたが、辛い物も辛くない物もあり、ベジタリアン向けの選択肢もあります。早めに確認しないといけないのは人数だけで、店によると八人を超える場合は前日までに料理を決めないと、提供が遅くなるそうです。さらに、食べられない物も早めに教えてほしくて、海鮮がだめな人もいれば最近カロリーを気にしている人もいるので、そのあたりも先に考えておきたいです。

If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

translated_text: This time I want to try to arrange a little easier, so the place chosen near the company, everyone went through after work. menu I first saw once, hot and not hot, there are vegetable options. the only thing to be confirmed earlier is the number, because the store says eight people more than one day to eat a meal, otherwise the meal will be slower. In addition I want to let everyone earlier tell me the cravings, someone can't eat seafood, someone has recently in the control of heat, I want to think together in advance, without getting the time to change the place again.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed the photos on the computer to the mobile hard drive, and handfully arranged several folder. last year's trip video occupied a lot of space, so I'm ready to first remove the repeated pieces, then upload the important material to the cloud drive. if this night the network is stable, you can help me together check the name is no problem, so that later find it too difficult. tomorrow I also want to unify each folder with the date and location labels, so later to do the album or temporarily find the material, will save a lot of time than now, and it's not easy to mix the similar content.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. The videos from last year's trip take up a lot of space, so I plan to delete the duplicate clips first and then upload the important footage to the cloud drive. If the internet is stable tonight, can you help me check whether the file names look okay so it won't be such a hassle to find them later? Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I want to start re-adjusting from the next week. the plan is to wake up every morning at 7 a.m., first walk for twenty minutes, then back to breakfast, then eight and a half start to deal with the most important work. at night try to sleep before the 11 a.m., before sleep not to see the news and not to print the video. if I have a delay, you remember to remind me, otherwise I would be easy to find myself an excuse. another weekend I want to leave half a day to do households and purchases, fill the refrigerator, by the way, make the clothes to wear the next week ready in advance, so the work day night will not always be sold out because it is too tired and easy.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
translated_text: Have you been free this afternoon?
reference_text: Hi, are you free this afternoon?

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: Please call me before 3 p.m.
reference_text: Please call me back before three o'clock.

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: I’ve got to the metro station.
reference_text: I've already arrived at the subway station entrance.

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: The document must be printed in two copies.
reference_text: This document needs to be printed in two copies.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: I don’t go to the company today, I change to the line.
reference_text: I'm not going to the office today. I'll switch to online instead.

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: I am going to go to the customer at 6 this evening, and if the road is blocked, I will send you a message first, I'm sorry you help me leave the meeting room at 7 pm.
reference_text: I'm meeting a client at six tonight. If traffic is bad, I'll message you first. Please keep the meeting room reserved for me until seven.

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: The refrigerator has milk and eggs, but the fruit is soon to be eaten.If you go out of the work and go to the supermarket, help me buy two bananas and a bag of bread.
reference_text: There is still milk and eggs in the fridge, but we're almost out of fruit. If you stop by the supermarket after work, please buy two bananas and a bag of bread for me.

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: If tomorrow morning it will be rain, we will not go to the park, move to the nearby cafe to sit a while, and, by the way, confirm the next week’s schedule.
reference_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we won't go to the park. We'll go to a nearby cafe instead, sit for a while, and confirm next week's schedule.

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: I just finished the phone with the owner, he told me that at two a.m. he would fix the water heater. if you are at home, remember to remove the things on the balcony in advance.
reference_text: I just finished talking to the landlord. He said he'll come tomorrow at two in the afternoon to fix the water heater. If you're home, please remember to move the things on the balcony in advance.
must_preserve: move the things on the balcony

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: There are plenty of people in this weekend, it’s best to book first.If you’re sure you can come, I’ll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
translated_text: I have arranged the next week’s trip again: Monday morning first to the airport, landing directly to the customer office, afternoon at 3:00 to make product presentation. at night if everyone has time, I want to take a brief review again, record the question of the other person temporarily, not to miss the next day’s discussion. in addition I will put the sample and the charging separate, the material also pre-print two pieces in the bag, so the site if it is temporarily necessary to add the description, it is not necessary to find the document again busy and busy.
reference_text: I went over next week's business trip schedule again: on Monday morning I'll head to the airport first, go straight to the client's office after landing, and give the product demo at three in the afternoon. If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
translated_text: Yesterday mom called for, grandmother's appetite was not very good, but the spirit was still well. She let us not worry too much, just remind me if there was a weekend, it's best to go back to see, by the way, put the last time bought the drug on the belt. If you're also comfortable, we can go out on Saturday morning, go home before midday, go with her to eat a meal and go back. If grandmother wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, the most important thing is to let her know we always remember her, there's something in the house that needs help and can also look.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: This time I want to try to arrange a little easier, so the place chosen near the company, everyone went through after work. menu I first saw once, hot and not hot, there are vegetable options. the only thing to be confirmed earlier is the number, because the store says eight people more than one day to eat a meal, otherwise the meal will be slower. In addition I want to let everyone earlier tell me the cravings, someone can't eat seafood, someone has recently in the control of heat, I want to think together in advance, without getting the time to change the place again.

source_text: 最近作息有点乱，我想从下周开始重新调整。计划是每天早上七点起床，先散步二十分钟，再回来吃早餐，然后八点半开始处理最重要的工作。晚上尽量十一点前睡觉，睡前不看消息也不刷视频。如果我又拖延了，你记得提醒我，不然我很容易给自己找借口。另外周末我想留半天做家务和采购，把冰箱补满，顺便把下周要穿的衣服提前准备好，这样工作日晚上就不会总是因为太累而随便点外卖了。
translated_text: I want to start re-adjusting from the next week. the plan is to wake up every morning at 7 a.m., first walk for twenty minutes, then back to breakfast, then eight and a half start to deal with the most important work. at night try to sleep before the 11 a.m., before sleep not to see the news and not to print the video. if I have a delay, you remember to remind me, otherwise I would be easy to find myself an excuse. another weekend I want to leave half a day to do households and purchases, fill the refrigerator, by the way, make the clothes to wear the next week ready in advance, so the work day night will not always be sold out because it is too tired and easy.
reference_text: My routine has been a bit messy lately, so I want to reset it starting next week. The plan is to get up at seven every morning, take a twenty-minute walk first, come back for breakfast, and then start on the most important work at eight thirty. At night, I'll try to be in bed before eleven and avoid checking messages or watching videos before sleep. If I start putting things off again, please remind me, or I'll easily make excuses for myself. On the weekend, I also want to leave half a day for chores and grocery shopping, restock the fridge, and lay out the clothes I'll need for next week so I won't end up ordering takeout on work nights just because I'm too tired.

source_text: 你好，今天下午有空吗？
translated_text: Have you been free this afternoon?
reference_text: Hi, are you free this afternoon?

source_text: 请在三点前回我电话。
translated_text: Please call me before 3 p.m.
reference_text: Please call me back before three o'clock.

source_text: 我已经到地铁站门口了。
translated_text: I’ve got to the metro station.
reference_text: I've already arrived at the subway station entrance.

source_text: 这份文件一共要打印两份。
translated_text: The document must be printed in two copies.
reference_text: This document needs to be printed in two copies.

source_text: 我今天不去公司，改成线上。
translated_text: I don’t go to the company today, I change to the line.
reference_text: I'm not going to the office today. I'll switch to online instead.

source_text: 我今晚六点要去见客户，如果路上堵车，我会先发消息告诉你，麻烦你帮我把会议室留到七点。
translated_text: I am going to go to the customer at 6 this evening, and if the road is blocked, I will send you a message first, I'm sorry you help me leave the meeting room at 7 pm.
reference_text: I'm meeting a client at six tonight. If traffic is bad, I'll message you first. Please keep the meeting room reserved for me until seven.

source_text: 冰箱里还有牛奶和鸡蛋，但水果快吃完了。你下班顺路去超市的话，帮我买两根香蕉和一袋面包。
translated_text: The refrigerator has milk and eggs, but the fruit is soon to be eaten.If you go out of the work and go to the supermarket, help me buy two bananas and a bag of bread.
reference_text: There is still milk and eggs in the fridge, but we're almost out of fruit. If you stop by the supermarket after work, please buy two bananas and a bag of bread for me.

source_text: 明天早上如果下雨，我们就不去公园了，改去附近的咖啡店坐一会儿，顺便把下周的行程确认一下。
translated_text: If tomorrow morning it will be rain, we will not go to the park, move to the nearby cafe to sit a while, and, by the way, confirm the next week’s schedule.
reference_text: If it rains tomorrow morning, we won't go to the park. We'll go to a nearby cafe instead, sit for a while, and confirm next week's schedule.

source_text: 我刚和房东通完电话，他说明天下午两点来修热水器。你如果在家，记得提前把阳台那边的东西挪开。
translated_text: I just finished the phone with the owner, he told me that at two a.m. he would fix the water heater. if you are at home, remember to remove the things on the balcony in advance.
reference_text: I just finished talking to the landlord. He said he'll come tomorrow at two in the afternoon to fix the water heater. If you're home, please remember to move the things on the balcony in advance.
must_preserve: move the things on the balcony

source_text: 这家餐厅周末人很多，最好先订位。要是你确定能来，我今晚就把四个人的位置一起订好。
translated_text: There are plenty of people in this weekend, it’s best to book first.If you’re sure you can come, I’ll book four people together tonight.
reference_text: This restaurant gets very crowded on weekends, so it's better to make a reservation first. If you're sure you can come, I'll book a table for four tonight.
must_preserve: if you're sure you can come

source_text: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍：周一早上先去机场，落地后直接去客户办公室，下午三点做产品演示。晚上如果大家还有时间，我想再约一次简短的复盘，把对方临时提出的问题都记下来，免得第二天讨论时遗漏。另外我会把样机和充电器分开装，材料也提前打印两份放在包里，这样现场如果临时需要补充说明，就不用再手忙脚乱地找文件。
translated_text: I have arranged the next week’s trip again: Monday morning first to the airport, landing directly to the customer office, afternoon at 3:00 to make product presentation. at night if everyone has time, I want to take a brief review again, record the question of the other person temporarily, not to miss the next day’s discussion. in addition I will put the sample and the charging separate, the material also pre-print two pieces in the bag, so the site if it is temporarily necessary to add the description, it is not necessary to find the document again busy and busy.
reference_text: I went over next week's business trip schedule again: on Monday morning I'll head to the airport first, go straight to the client's office after landing, and give the product demo at three in the afternoon. If everyone still has time in the evening, I'd like to schedule a short debrief and write down all of the issues they raise on the spot so we don't miss anything in the discussion the next day. I'll also pack the demo unit and charger separately, and print two copies of the materials in advance so I won't have to scramble for files if we need to explain something on site.

source_text: 昨天妈妈打电话来说，外婆这两天胃口不太好，但精神还可以。她让我们别太担心，只是提醒我如果周末有空，最好回去看看，顺便把上次买的药带上。如果你也方便，我们可以周六早上一起出发，中午前到家，陪她吃顿饭再回来。要是外婆想休息，我们也不用待太久，最重要的是让她知道我们一直惦记着她，家里有什么需要帮忙的也可以顺便看看。
translated_text: Yesterday mom called for, grandmother's appetite was not very good, but the spirit was still well. She let us not worry too much, just remind me if there was a weekend, it's best to go back to see, by the way, put the last time bought the drug on the belt. If you're also comfortable, we can go out on Saturday morning, go home before midday, go with her to eat a meal and go back. If grandmother wants to rest, we don't have to stay too long, the most important thing is to let her know we always remember her, there's something in the house that needs help and can also look.
reference_text: Mom called yesterday and said Grandma hasn't had much appetite these past two days, but her spirits are still okay. She told us not to worry too much, but reminded me that if I have time this weekend, I should go back to visit her and bring along the medicine we bought last time. If you're available too, we can leave together on Saturday morning, get there before noon, have a meal with her, and then come back. If Grandma wants to rest, we don't need to stay too long. The most important thing is to let her know that we've been thinking about her, and we can also check whether there is anything at home that needs help.

source_text: 这次团队聚餐我想尽量安排得轻松一点，所以地点选在公司附近，大家下班后走过去就行。菜单我先看过一遍，辣的和不辣的都有，也有素食选项。唯一需要早点确认的是人数，因为店里说八个人以上要提前一天点菜，不然上菜会比较慢。另外我想让大家早点把忌口告诉我，有人不能吃海鲜，也有人最近在控制热量，我想一起提前考虑进去，免得到时候现场再改来改去。
translated_text: This time I want to try to arrange a little easier, so the place chosen near the company, everyone went through after work. menu I first saw once, hot and not hot, there are vegetable options. the only thing to be confirmed earlier is the number, because the store says eight people more than one day to eat a meal, otherwise the meal will be slower. In addition I want to let everyone earlier tell me the cravings, someone can't eat seafood, someone has recently in the control of heat, I want to think together in advance, without getting the time to change the place again.
reference_text: For this team dinner, I want to keep things as relaxed as possible, so I picked a place near the office that everyone can walk to after work. I already looked through the menu: there are spicy and non-spicy dishes, and there are vegetarian options as well. The only thing we need to confirm early is the headcount, because the restaurant said that for groups of more than eight people, the dishes need to be ordered a day in advance or the food will come out slowly. I also want everyone to tell me their food restrictions early, because some people can't eat seafood and others are trying to keep their calories down, and I'd rather factor that in ahead of time than change everything on the spot.

source_text: 我刚把电脑里的照片备份到移动硬盘，又顺手整理了几个文件夹。去年旅行的视频占了很多空间，所以我准备先删掉重复的片段，再把重要的素材上传到云盘。要是今晚网络稳定，你可以帮我一起检查一下命名有没有问题，免得以后找起来太麻烦。明天我还想把每个文件夹统一加上日期和地点标签，这样以后做相册或者临时找素材的时候，会比现在省很多时间，也不容易把相似的内容弄混。
translated_text: I just backed the photos on the computer to the mobile hard drive, and handfully arranged several folder. last year's trip video occupied a lot of space, so I'm ready to first remove the repeated pieces, then upload the important material to the cloud drive. if this night the network is stable, you can help me together check the name is no problem, so that later find it too difficult. tomorrow I also want to unify each folder with the date and location labels, so later to do the album or temporarily find the material, will save a lot of time than now, and it's not easy to mix the similar content.
reference_text: I just backed up the photos from my computer to an external hard drive and tidied up a few folders while I was at it. Tomorrow I also want to add date and location tags to every folder, so it will save a lot of time when I make albums or need to find footage in a hurry, and it'll be less likely that similar files get mixed up.
